stage-dynamic-assets.reason: Stage may have missing or different image assets. Treat avatar/profile image diffs as warning until prod baseline is confirmed.

third-party-ad-diff.reason: Third-party ad areas are dynamic and should be masked or ignored.

news-list-dynamic-content.reason: News ordering and thumbnails may change frequently. Prefer section layout snapshot with masks over exact full-page snapshot.

result-detail-url-stale.reason: Sample result detail URL may become stale or unavailable. Treat as fixture maintenance issue unless confirmed product bug.
